countdown.title: Lunar New Year Countdown
countdown.description: Countdown to 2026 Lunar New Year to celebrate Vietnam's Tet
countdown.detailedDescription: A time filled with excitement and warm anticipation as each passing day brings the spirit of spring closer. Streets slowly glow with red decorations, lanterns, and the blossoms of peach and apricot flowers, signaling that Tết is near. It is a moment for reflection on the year gone by, for letting go of worries, and for turning our hearts toward family, tradition, and hope. The countdown is not just about waiting for midnight on Lunar New Year’s Eve, but about preparing for a fresh beginning—one where the timeless values of Vietnam’s Tết are cherished, renewed, and shared with future generations. 🌸🧧
